seoTitle: Fords vs Forest Range — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fords and Forest Range. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fords vs Forest Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fords and Forest Range.
heading: Fords vs Forest Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fords, South Australia and Forest Range, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fords has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Forest Range (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fords or Forest Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fords has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Forest Range scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fords scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Forest Range scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fords or Forest Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fords has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
